description: TW synthetic-fixture registry. Maps each synthetic .docx to its target walker mechanism, retirement threshold, and over-fit audit provenance. Re-read by Phase G invocations to drive synthetic retirement when real-corpus coverage reaches thresholds. Plan reference: /Users/chrischen/.claude/plans/structured-cuddling-parnas.md Phase A0/A2.

status_lifecycle.active: Target mechanism not yet shipped. Synthetic drives Phase C round viability.
status_lifecycle.regression_only: Mechanism shipped; synthetic stays in harness as protected regression test.
status_lifecycle.retired: Real corpus has reached retirement_threshold; synthetic removed from harness manifest but build script still reproduces it for audit.

synthetic_fixtures.overfit_audit_notes: GLOBAL GUARDRAIL. Claims 2/3/4 reference 該機殼/所述導熱材/該溫控電路 with NO antecedent intro. Walker emits 3 findings; all protect:true. If any round silences one, the mechanism is over-relaxed. Never retire.

Drafted TW-first. Tier A (轉變為/分為) in chemistry; Tier B (基於/來自) in software; Tier C (為/是) in mechanical. 3 emissions represent coverage gaps F12 port should resolve. c1 'so述輸入訊號' (bare, no 一 intro) may be legit_drafting_error.

CAVEAT: C8 formula-reference mechanism may be N/A to TW drafting — TIPO convention does not use 所述式(N), so walker never emits bare 式(X) as term. 2 emissions are over-capture artifacts, not formula references. Consider dropping C8 port; document finding in Phase 9.
Markush group 選自由...所組成之群組 in chemistry + software variants. 3 emissions: 2 coverage gaps (第一化合物, 語音) + 1 walker over-capture (選自由). Exercises F-family intro registration over Markush members.

REGRESSION TEST. Claims 2/3/4 reference 該等感測器 / 該些控制器 (TW-valid plural). Walker emits 0 on those refs (correct). 1 emission on c1 due to colon-list F11 coverage gap — C4 F11 port will silence. TW-valid path confirmed: 該等/該些 NOT flagged as tw_contamination.

REGRESSION for commit 8287c24. Claims 2/3/4 are independent (一種X preamble) with body-embedded 執行/根據/實施 如請求項1 refs. Walker emits 0 findings: ancestor-chain walk correctly propagates via quoted_references field.
REGRESSION TEST for check_claims_symbol_table_consistency. 符號說明 uses sub-figure notation 圖1A/圖1B/圖2(a)/圖2(b). Walker emits 0 antecedent findings: all reference numerals properly introduced + defined.
Jepson two-part claims with 其特徵在於 (invention) + 其改良在於 (improvement). Walker emits 0 findings: transition phrases recognized, both-part intros registered.

PARTIAL TEST. 3 intended filter cases: length-ratio, leading-particle, substring-wrap. Only 2 emissions — walker strips some refs that were intended as test cases. B3 filter coverage remains dominated by real-corpus emissions; this fixture is a regression gate, not a complete filter exercise.
